zh.lifeSummary: 當John Hutchinson於1658年出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可波斯頓時，他的父親Ralph Hutchinson23歲，母親Alice Walcott22歲。他於1682年12月27日與Hannah Root在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼哈普爾諾薩普頓結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1719年12月21日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州劍橋大學默里 倫敦勒班農享年61歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Hutchinson于1658年出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可波斯頓时，他的父亲Ralph Hutchinson23岁，母亲Alice Walcott22岁。他于1682年12月27日与Hannah Root在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼哈普爾諾薩普頓结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1719年12月21日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州劍橋大學默里 倫敦勒班農享年61岁。

nameMeanings.name: Hutchinson
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (northern): patronymic from the Old French personal name Hucheon (see Houchin ) + -son.
Irish: in Ireland and Scotland, adopted for Mac Uisdein and Mac Uistin; see McCutcheon .

History: Anne Marbury Hutchinson (1591–1643) and her husband William came from Lincolnshire, England, to MA in 1634. A religious dissident, she led the first attack on the Puritans and was banished from the Massachusetts Bay Colony. She moved to RI in 1638, and, after her husband's death in 1642, settled in NY, where the Hutchinson River was named in her honor. Ironically, the Hutchinson name stayed on in MA and one of her descendants, Thomas Hutchinson (1711–80), was royal governor of Massachusetts Bay Colony.

variants.name: Houchin
meanings: English (Essex): of Norman origin, from the Old French personal name Huchon, a double diminutive of Hue (see Hugh ) common in Picardy, corresponding to Old French Hueçon, Huesson, modern French Husson. This was used as a personal name in Scotland, where it also became a surname and was adopted in Gaelic as Huisdean or Uisdean; see McCutcheon and compare Hutch .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

en.lifeSummary: When John Hutchinson was born in 1658, in Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, his father, Ralph Hutchinson, was 23 and his mother, Alice Walcott, was 22. He married Hannah Root on 27 December 1682, in Northampton, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 21 December 1719, in Lebanon, New London, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 61.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Hutchinson est né en 1658, à Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, son père, Ralph Hutchinson, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Alice Walcott, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Hannah Root le 27 décembre 1682, à Northampton, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 21 décembre 1719, à Lebanon, New London, Connecticut Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 61 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Hutchinson 1658 in Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America geboren wurde, war sein Vater Ralph Hutchinson 23 und seine Mutter Alice Walcott 22. Er hat am 27. Dezember 1682 in Northampton, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America Hannah Root geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 21. Dezember 1719 im Alter von 61 Jahren in Lebanon, New London, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Hutchinson è nato il nel 1658 nel Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, il suo padre, Ralph Hutchinson, aveva 23 anni e il suo madre, Alice Walcott, aveva 22 anni. Lui sposato Hannah Root il 27 dicembre 1682, nel Northampton, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 21 dicembre 1719, nel Lebanon, New London, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, all'età di 61 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: John Hutchinsonが1658年にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニースフォルクボストンで生まれた時，父Ralph Hutchinsonは23歳，母Alice Walcottは22歳であった。1682年12月27日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーハンプシュアイアノーサンプトンでHannah Rootと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1719年12月21日にイギリス植民地アメリカコネチカット州ニュー ロンドンレバノンで61歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John Hutchinson(이)가 1658년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 수폴크 보스턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Ralph Hutchinson(은)는 23세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice Walcott(은)는 22세였다. 그는 1682년 12월 27일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 함프실르 노르섬프턴에서 Hannah Root(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1719년 12월 21일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 뉴 런던 레바넌에서 61세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Hutchinson nasceu em 1658, em Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, seu pai, Ralph Hutchinson, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Alice Walcott, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Hannah Root em 27 de dezembro de 1682, em Northampton, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 21 de dezembro de 1719, em Lebanon, New London, Conecticute, British Colonial America, com 61 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Hutchinson родился в 1658 г. в местности бостон, суффолк, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика, его отцу по имени Ralph Hutchinson было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Alice Walcott, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Hannah Root 27 декабря 1682 г. в местности нортамптон, хампшир, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 3 дочери. Он умер 21 декабря 1719 г. в местности лебанон, ню лондон, Коннектикут, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 61 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Hutchinson nació en 1658, en Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, su papá, Ralph Hutchinson, tenía 23 años y su mamá, Alice Walcott, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Hannah Root el 27 de diciembre de 1682, en Northampton, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 21 de diciembre de 1719, en Lebanon, New London, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 61 años.
